datasources.name: retail
datasources.description: Retail transaction data from CSV — customer purchases, product categories, and order details

tables.name: retail_transactions_typed
tables.description: Retail transactions with parsed date/time columns. Contains customer demographics, purchase amounts, product info, and order status.

tables.name: retail_transactions
tables.description: Raw retail transactions imported from CSV. Use retail_transactions_typed instead for typed date/time columns.
